abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
abort.already_configured: Span Panel already configured. Only a single configuration is possible.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The panel at this address has a different serial number. You cannot switch to a different panel during reconfiguration.
abort.v1_not_supported: v1 firmware is not supported. Please upgrade your panel firmware to v2.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Span Panel
error.host_required: Host is required for non-simulator mode
error.proximity_failed: Proximity not proven. Please open and close the panel door 3 times and try again.

confirm_discovery.description: Do you want to setup Span Panel at {host}?
confirm_discovery.title: Connect to the Span Panel

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of SPAN Panel (required for real hardware, optional for simulation mode)
data_description.simulator_mode: Enable simulator mode for testing (no hardware required). Host field becomes optional when simulation mode is enabled.
data_description.power_display_precision: Number of decimal places for power values (0-3)
data_description.energy_display_precision: Number of decimal places for energy values (0-3)
data_description.enable_energy_dip_compensation: Automatically compensate when the panel reports lower energy readings, preventing spikes in the energy dashboard.

user.description: Enter the connection details for your SPAN Panel. For simulation mode, check the simulator checkbox and the host field becomes optional.
user.title: Connect to the Span Panel

menu_options.auth_proximity: Authenticate through your physical Span Panel

auth_proximity.title: Proximity Authentication
auth_proximity.description: Please open and close the Span Panel door 3 times.

auth_token.title: Manual Token Authentication
auth_token.description: Please enter your access token (empty to start over):

auth_passphrase.title: Panel Passphrase
auth_passphrase.description: Enter the passphrase for your SPAN Panel. This is printed on the panel label or set by the panel owner.

data_description.hop_passphrase: The passphrase used to authenticate with the SPAN Panel v2 API

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SPAN Panel
reconfigure.description: Update the host address for this SPAN Panel. The panel serial number must match.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the SPAN Panel

simulator_config.title: Simulator Configuration
simulator_config.description: Select a simulation configuration and optionally set a custom start time. {config_count} configurations available.

data_description.simulation_config: Choose a simulation configuration that defines circuit templates and energy profiles
data_description.host: Custom serial number for the simulated panel (optional, will use config default if empty)
data_description.simulation_start_time: Time format: HH:MM (24h), H:MM (12h), or full ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS). Leave empty to use current time.
data_description.entity_naming_pattern: Choose how circuit entities are named in the simulation

error.Invalid date/time format. Use ISO format: Invalid time format. Use HH:MM (24h), H:MM (12h), or full ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS)

data_description.snapshot_update_interval: How often to rebuild the panel snapshot from MQTT data. Lower values give faster updates but use more CPU. Increase on low-power hardware (e.g., Raspberry Pi). Set to 0 for no debounce. Range: 0–15 seconds.
data_description.enable_panel_net_energy_sensors: Create net energy sensors for panel-level energy flows (main meter and feed-through). Shows true energy balance accounting for bidirectional flows.
data_description.enable_circuit_net_energy_sensors: Create net energy sensors for individual circuits. Shows true energy consumption accounting for reactive power and regenerative flows.
data_description.energy_reporting_grace_period: How long energy sensors maintain their last known value when the panel becomes unavailable (0-60 minutes). Helps preserve energy statistics integrity during brief outages. Default: 15 minutes.
data_description.enable_energy_dip_compensation: Automatically compensate when the panel reports lower energy readings. Disabling clears all accumulated offsets.

simulation_start_time.title: Simulation Start Time
simulation_start_time.description: Configure the simulation start time. Changes to simulation time will reload the integration to apply the new time.

data_description.simulation_start_time: Time format: HH:MM (24h), H:MM (12h), or full ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS). Leave empty to use current time. Integration will reload to apply changes.

simulation_offline_minutes.title: Simulation Offline Minutes
simulation_offline_minutes.description: Configure how long the panel should appear offline during simulation.

data_description.simulation_offline_minutes: Number of minutes the panel should appear offline during simulation. Set to 0 to disable offline simulation.

export_config.title: Export Synthetic Sensor Config
export_config.description: Export the current synthetic sensor configuration to a YAML file. You can specify either a directory (file will be named automatically) or a full file path. Default filename: {filename}

data_description.directory: Either a directory path (file will be named automatically) or a full file path ending in .yaml where the configuration will be saved.

panel_auth_failed.message: Authentication with the SPAN Panel failed. Please reauthenticate.

panel_connection_failed.message: Failed to connect to the SPAN Panel at {host}.

panel_not_ready.message: The SPAN Panel is not ready. Please check that the panel is online.

circuit_priority_failed.message: Failed to set circuit priority for {circuit}.

circuit_relay_failed.message: Failed to set circuit relay state for {circuit}.

gfe_override_failed.message: Failed to send GFE override to the panel.
